list.name: GPT-2 from scratch (work in progress)
list.desc: Implementing the full system from scratch, from tokenizer and model architecture to training pipeline and evaluation.

list.name: ASR Beyond High-Resource Languages
list.desc: Built a multilingual ASR pipeline for 21 underrepresented languages and achieved 3rd place in the Mozilla Common Voice Shared Task.

list.name: Understanding Whether Speech-LLM Models Listen or Read
list.desc: Built an attribution framework to analyze how Speech-to-Text Translation models mix audio and text context, using Captum-based multimodal interpretability, forced alignment, and token-level visualizations for reproducible research.

list.name: Reconstructing Missing MRI Sequences with Deep Learning
list.desc: A deep learning framework for cross-modality MRI synthesis, using U-Net and pix2pix to generate missing sequences from aligned 2D scans with a strong focus on reproducibility and anatomical fidelity. Developed as my undergraduate Physics thesis.

list.name: Named Entity Recognition with BERT
list.desc: Implemented a PyTorch-based BERT pipeline for named entity recognition, working with transformer models for token-level classification in NLP.
